case_title: MARCO SVIZZERO VS. WINDHORSE & ASSOCIATES, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS. PLAINTIFFS MARCO SVIZZERO ARE CHRISTIAN SVIZZERO ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WINDHORSE & ASSOCIATES, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CHARLIE BODEN, CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SVIZZERO, MARCO SVIZZERO, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT WINDHORSE & ASSOCIATES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WINDHORSE & ASSOCIATES, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00) SERVED DEC-04-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WINDHORSE & ASSOCIATES, INC.
